ocr_findings.description: '試験にはコレが出る！' banner at top rendered as 'つし' in OCR — icon/stylised text partially mangled, but surrounding content intact

reviewer_notes: Page covers 構成管理、変更管理、リリース管理 prose sections. No tables on this page. All three section headings and their body paragraphs are faithfully reproduced including the セキュリティパッチ example and the rollback note at the end. Only cosmetic issue is the stylised banner icon rendering.
